/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_parse_yaml.dir/test/test_parse_yaml.cpp.o -o test_parse_yaml  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rcl_yaml_param_parser:/root/ros2_ws/install/libyaml_vendor/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rmw/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib gtest/libgtest_main.a gtest/libgtest.a librcl_yaml_param_parser.so -pthread /root/ros2_ws/install/libyaml_vendor/lib/libyaml.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rmw/lib/librmw.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
